description: Allows admins to edit document classification metadata (category, docType, sensitivityLabel, status, docOwner, department, region, businessUnit, retentionPolicy, language, tags, sourcefile) for indexed documents from the File Queue UI. Changes are persisted to Azure AI Search using a batched merge operation across all document chunks. A parallel non-fatal SQL rename also fires if the sourcefile name changed.
entry_points: handleSubmit() in useFileQueueEditMetadata.js fires onSubmitMetadata callback

external: Azure AI Search SDK: SearchClient.search() — paginated chunk ID fetch
Azure AI Search SDK: SearchClient.merge_or_upload_documents() — batch field merge

db_operations: Azure AI Search: merge_or_upload_documents — patches metadata fields on all chunks of a document
SQL (parallel, non-fatal): UPDATE doc_intel_files_processing SET file_name WHERE id — display name rename only
key_design_decisions: Azure Search is the metadata source of truth, not SQL
All chunks of a document are updated atomically in batches of 1000
@search.action merge ensures only provided fields are overwritten
Parallel Promise.all fires Azure update + SQL rename simultaneously
SQL rename is non-fatal: caught error does not block Azure update
Double null-stripping: frontend omitBlankValues + backend get_non_null_updates
